title: Driveway packing — Sara and Eva swap items
prompt: Mid-wide shot on @driveway, sunny morning. The black @jeep-wrangler is already parked with the rear tailgate down, license plate reading 'SARA AND EVA' visible on the rear bumper. @Mama already at the open tailgate of the Jeep, lifting a small blue cooler into the cargo area. @Sara already standing at the rear driver-side door, clutching a white-and-black soccer ball with both hands, proud. @Eva already next to her, holding a pink tennis racket up like a trophy, a tiny smirk on her face. Mama (lifting the cooler in, glancing at the kids): "Got snacks, sunscreen, and a road map. Anyone seen the GPS?" Sara (raising the soccer ball): "I got this for my sister!" Eva (raising the tennis racket): "And I'M bringing this... just in case soccer's NOT easy." Sara (smug): "I KNEW you'd say that."
